'''fanaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waaw|waaw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waaw|waaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fanaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fænæzæth|fænæzæth]] || [[word:fænæzæj|fænæzæj]] || [[word:fænæzæsh|fænæzæsh]] || [[word:fænæzæ|fænæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fananazath|fananazath]] || [[word:fananazaj|fananazaj]] || [[word:fananazash|fananazash]] || [[word:fananaza|fananaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanazath|fanazath]] || [[word:fanazaj|fanazaj]] || [[word:fanazash|fanazash]] || [[word:fanaza|fanaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanafzath|fanafzath]] || [[word:fanafzaj|fanafzaj]] || [[word:fanafzash|fanafzash]] || [[word:fanafzaf|fanafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanazatha|fanazatha]] || [[word:fanazaja|fanazaja]] || [[word:fanazasha|fanazasha]] || [[word:fanazaka|fanazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanazath|fanazath]] || [[word:fanazaj|fanazaj]] || [[word:fanazash|fanazash]] || [[word:fanaza|fanaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanazathal|fanazathal]] || [[word:fanazajal|fanazajal]] || [[word:fanazashal|fanazashal]] || [[word:fanazakal|fanazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanazathatha|fanazathatha]] || [[word:fanazajaja|fanazajaja]] || [[word:fanazashasha|fanazashasha]] || [[word:fanazaka|fanazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanazathan|fanazathan]] || [[word:fanazajan|fanazajan]] || [[word:fanazashan|fanazashan]] || [[word:fanazakan|fanazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanazathaoro|fanazathaoro]] || [[word:fanazajaoro|fanazajaoro]] || [[word:fanazashaoro|fanazashaoro]] || [[word:fanazakaoro|fanazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
